name: Rawkto Bilaap
overview: A group of friends gather for a bachelor party at an eerie house in the outskirts of Kolkata. Things take a dark turn when they bite the dust one by one.

trailers.title: Rawkto Bilaap (রক্ত বিলাপ) | Official Trailer | Sohini, Tuhina, Alivia, Indrasish | 18 Feb | hoichoi
